description_long: This stuffed toy is designed to resemble a golden bear with a cartoonish, animatronic appearance. It features a rounded head with large, circular eyes, a black top hat, and a black bow tie, giving it a formal yet playful look. The bear's mouth is open, revealing a set of white teeth, and it has a prominent black nose. Its body is segmented at the joints, with visible seams and exaggerated, rounded limbs, and it holds a microphone in its right hand, suggesting a performer or entertainer theme. The left hand and forearm are white, contrasting with the rest of the golden-brown body. The overall surface appears plush and soft, with a matte finish and some visible stitching details.
description: A golden bear stuffed toy with a black top hat, bow tie, and microphone, featuring segmented limbs and a white left hand. Its cartoonish face has large eyes, an open mouth with teeth, and a playful, animatronic style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the bear's face, black top hat, bow tie, open mouth with teeth, and microphone held in the right hand.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the bear's profile, the roundness of the head, and the microphone held forward.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, body, and limbs, with the black top hat and white left hand visible.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the bear's snout, open mouth, and the microphone in the right hand, with the left hand partially visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is wide-eyed and slightly unsettling, with large, open eyes and an open mouth showing teeth, giving a fixed, animated grin.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms bent at the elbows, right hand holding a microphone, and legs straight.
